metadata.title: 神の御子は今宵しも
metadata.subtitle: O Come, All Ye Faithful / Adeste Fideles — Japanese
metadata.lyricist: John Francis Wade (c. 1711–1786), Latin original "Adeste Fideles"; English translation by Frederick Oakeley (1802–1880) and William Thomas Brooke (1848–1917); Japanese translation by the editorial committee of 讃美歌 (1903 / 1954)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Original Latin lyrics and tune by Wade (d. 1786) and English translations by Oakeley (d. 1880) and Brooke (d. 1917) are PD by > 100 years. Japanese translation first appeared in 讃美歌 (1903) and was carried into 讃美歌 (1954) no. 111. The 1903 hymnal predates living editors and Japanese Wikipedia quotes the text in full as PD-cleared

chordpro:
{title: 神の御子は今宵しも}
{subtitle: Adeste Fideles / O Come, All Ye Faithful — Japanese, 讃美歌 (1903 / 1954) no. 111}
{key: G}
{time: 4/4}
{tempo: 88}

{start_of_verse: 1}
[G]神の御[D]子は [G]今宵[C]し[G]も
kami no miko wa, koyoi shimo
[D]ベツレ[G]ヘムに [D]生(うま)れた[G]もう
betsurehemu ni, umare tamou
[G]いざや[D]友よ [G]もろと[C]も[G]に
iza ya tomo yo, moro tomo ni
[G]いそぎ[D]ゆきて [G]拝(おが)まず[D]や[G]
isogi yukite, ogamazu ya
[G]いそぎ[D]ゆきて [G]拝まず[D]や[G]
isogi yukite, ogamazu ya
{end_of_verse}

{start_of_verse: 2}
[G]賤(しず)の女(め)[D]をば [G]母と[C]し[G]て
shizu no me woba, haha to shite
[D]生(うま)れまし[G]し [D]みどり[G]ごは
umare mashishi, midorigo wa
[G]まことの[D]神 [G]きみの[C][G]君
makoto no kami, kimi no kimi
[G]いそぎ[D]ゆきて [G]拝まず[D]や[G]
isogi yukite, ogamazu ya
[G]いそぎ[D]ゆきて [G]拝まず[D]や[G]
isogi yukite, ogamazu ya
{end_of_verse}

{start_of_verse: 3}
[G]「神に栄[D]え [G]あれか[C]し[G]」と
kami ni sakae, are kashi to
[D]みつかい[G]らの [D]声す[G]なり
mitsukai ra no, koe su nari
[G]地なる[D]人も [G]たたえ[C]つ[G]つ
chi naru hito mo, tatae tsutsu
[G]いそぎ[D]ゆきて [G]拝まず[D]や[G]
isogi yukite, ogamazu ya
[G]いそぎ[D]ゆきて [G]拝まず[D]や[G]
isogi yukite, ogamazu ya
{end_of_verse}

{start_of_verse: 4}
[G]とこしな[D]えの [G]みことば[C]は[G]
tokoshinae no, mikotoba wa
[D]今ぞ人[G]と [D]なりた[G]もう
ima zo hito to, nari tamou
[G]待ち望[D]みし [G]主の民[C]よ[G]
machi nozomishi, shu no tami yo
[G]おのが[D]幸(さち)を [G]祝(いわ)わず[D]や[G]
onoga sachi wo, iwawazu ya
[G]おのが[D]幸を [G]祝わず[D]や[G]
onoga sachi wo, iwawazu ya
{end_of_verse}
